descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes to face Red Deer Rustlers in Centennial Cup tier two best-of-seven series.
descriptionLong: Richmond Sockeyes will face Alberta champion Red Deer Rustlers in the first game of a best-of-seven Centennial Cup tier two junior hockey elimination series Tuesday night at Richmond Arena. The Sockeyes recently defeated Quesnel Millionaires 5-1 to win the Mowatt Cup in two straight games, extending their playoff winning streak to 15 games with their fourth consecutive series sweep.
